events_with_summaries.title: Dept. 46: Emerging Brands Modular - Correction Needed (Cat. 111)
events_with_summaries.status: Review for Publish review - No Comms
events_with_summaries.summary_text: Dept. 46: Stores should immediately move the Emerging Brands modular (C111) to the approved 4-foot gondola per the floor plan and remove it from any nonapproved fixtures to ensure correct execution ahead of week 12 support.

events_with_summaries.title: Dept. 46: Inkbox Brand Exit – Action Required
events_with_summaries.status: Review for Publish review - No Comms
events_with_summaries.summary_text: Dept. 46: Inkbox is exiting, so pull all product now and process dispose claims in the Claims app by end of week 11 to receive credit.

events_with_summaries.title: Handling Excess Pennies
events_with_summaries.status: Review for Publish review - No Comms
events_with_summaries.summary_text:
Handling excess pennies.

As cash transactions in stores are now rounded to the nearest nickel, associates need to monitor the amount of pennies in registers and self-checkouts, and know how to process the excess pennies. This message includes instruction on dealing with excess pennies.

events_with_summaries.title: Dept. 12: Moving Boxes Feature And Inventory
events_with_summaries.status: Review for Publish review - No Comms
events_with_summaries.summary_text: Dept. 12: An 8-foot Moving Supplies train is rolling out to 2,500 stores in April through September, and regular deep out scans on boxes are needed to maintain in-stock for customers.

events_with_summaries.title: Dept. 46: Bubble x Poppi Feature - Execution and Support
events_with_summaries.status: Review for Publish review - No Comms
events_with_summaries.summary_text: Dept. 46: Stores should immediately move Bubble x Poppi inventory to the salesfloor and set the endcap to capture limited-time demand, with weekly vendor replenishment support for Poppi beverages.

events_with_summaries.title: Dept. 46: L'Oreal Inventory Increase
events_with_summaries.status: Review for Publish review - No Comms
events_with_summaries.summary_text: Dept. 46: Expect a planned L’Oreal inventory build through early April to protect in-stocks, then a gradual return to normal by early June with flow stabilizing by July 4.

events_with_summaries.title: Dept. 90: Cream Cheese and Ricotta Cheese Move to Cheese Mod
events_with_summaries.status: Review for Publish review - No Comms
events_with_summaries.summary_text:
Dept. 90: There is currently a supply shortage of Philadelphia No Bake Cheesecake. In Q3, an additional assortment will be launched which should improve the situation.

Dept. 90: In week 9 (March 28 – April 3), ricotta cheese moved from the Cultured modular to the Cheese modular.

events_with_summaries.title: Frontend: How to Prevent Financial Services Scams and Fraud
events_with_summaries.status: Review for Publish review - No Comms
events_with_summaries.summary_text: Preventing fraud and protecting Financial Services customers is a critical part of your Money Center associate's job. This message gives associates resources for learning to prevent Financial Services scams and fraud.

events_with_summaries.title: Dept. 9: Speedo Week 10 Launch Kit
events_with_summaries.status: Review for Publish review - No Comms
events_with_summaries.summary_text: Dept. 9: Launches Speedo in week 10, and store associates should set the shipped signage kit on time, following the included instructions, to ensure a clean, easy-to-shop presentation.

events_with_summaries.title: Dept. 9: Week 10 GM Pad Modular Delays
events_with_summaries.status: Review for Publish review - No Comms
events_with_summaries.summary_text: Dept. 9: Week 10 GM Pad: Delays in Water Sports, Swim, Pools and Water Toys see the table for impacted items and get-well dates.

events_with_summaries.title: Balancing Over-the-Phone Ticket Support
events_with_summaries.status: Review for Publish review - No Comms
events_with_summaries.summary_text:
Balancing Over-the-Phone Ticket Support.

All associates who answer the store phone should understand that technology support agents may call regarding open incidents or tickets. After reading this message, phone operators will know how to authenticate and validate if the person calling is a Walmart technology agent. They will also learn how to report suspicious activity.
